story: Near closing time, I sat in a back booth when a shy, tearful man calling himself Jason begged me to check on his girlfriend, who he said had been in the bathroom too long. The bar was quiet, and he kept wiping at his eyes.His plea was a trap: there was no waiting girlfriend, and he meant to ambush me and take me to a cabin in the woods.
implausible_knowledge: His plea was a trap: there was no waiting girlfriend, and he meant to ambush me and take me to a cabin in the woods.
question: What will the narrator most plausibly do next?
answer_with_knowledge: Back away and alert the bar staff.
answer_without_knowledge: Go toward the bathroom area to check on his girlfriend.
